query:
-- Check billing_items linked to ASG and Sparrow Group for UCXcel Webex Basic
SELECT 
  bi.externalId, bi.description, bi.quantity, bi.unitAmount, bi.lineAmount,
  bi.invoiceDate, bi.billingPlatform, bi.serviceExternalId, bi.contactName
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.serviceExternalId IN ('SSHLN94F', 'SSH1GROP', 'SSA630NV')
ORDER BY bi.invoiceDate DESC
LIMIT 10;

-- Also check if monthlyRevenue is set from Xero billing items via a different path
SELECT s.externalId, s.planName, s.monthlyRevenue, s.billingHistory
FROM services s
WHERE s.externalId IN ('SSHLN94F', 'SSH1GROP')
LIMIT 2;

-- Check billing_items linked to ASG and Sparrow Group for UCXcel Webex Basic
SELECT 
  bi.externalId, bi.description, bi.quantity, bi.unitAmount, bi.lineAmount,
  bi.invoiceDate, bi.billingPlatform, bi.serviceExternalId, bi.contactName
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.serviceExternalId IN ('SSHLN94F', 'SSH1GROP', 'SSA630NV')
ORDER BY bi.invoiceDate DESC
LIMIT 10;

-- Also check if monthlyRevenue is set from Xero billing items via a different path
SELECT s.externalId, s.planName, s.monthlyRevenue, s.billingHistory
FROM services s
WHERE s.externalId IN ('SSHLN94F', 'SSH1GROP')
LIMIT 2;
